en:
Two core stats determine your situation:

[color=#66b3ff][b]Reality Score[/b][/color] represents your connection to truth.
[color=#ff66b3][b]Positive Energy[/b][/color] represents how much fuel the institution has left for its rituals.

Most cycles go through the same rhythm: prayer, disaster, concert, honeymoon period, then collapse again.

[i]Progress in this game is not about winning — it's about whether you survive long enough to understand the cycle.[/i]

[color=#777799][i]A note from the archives: In theory, higher Positive Energy accelerates the collapse of this world. But in practice — no matter how extreme the numbers grow — a single player's influence on the cosmos remains vanishingly small. From the universe's perspective, even the most catastrophic score barely registers as a whisper.

This game has no true ending: not because anyone forgot to add one, but because no score any player could ever achieve would be enough to actually tip the scales of reality. Those at FSM who lie awake dreading the approaching apocalypse are, cosmically speaking, not unlike someone convinced the sky will come crashing down tomorrow.[/i][/color]
zh:
有兩個核心數值會決定你的處境：

[color=#66b3ff][b]現實值[/b][/color]代表你與真相的連結程度。
[color=#ff66b3][b]正向能量[/b][/color]代表機構還有多少燃料維持它的儀式。

大多數循環都會經過同樣節奏：祈禱、災難、演唱會、蜜月期，然後再次崩潰。

[i]這個遊戲的進度不在於勝利，而在於你是否活得夠久，足以看懂循環。[/i]

[color=#777799][i]附記：理論上，正向能量越高，這個世界的崩潰就越快。但實際上——無論數值多誇張——玩家對整個宇宙的掌控力依然極其有限。從宇宙的尺度來看，即使最災難性的數值，也幾乎什麼都改變不了。

因此，這個遊戲實際上沒有真正的結局——不是因為有人忘了設計終局，而是因為任何玩家所能達到的數值，在這個世界觀裡根本不可能觸發真正的終結。那些在 FSM 裡對末日憂心忡忡的人，從宇宙的角度來看，就好像是有人深信明天天就會塌下來一樣。[/i][/color]
de:
Two core stats determine your situation:

[color=#66b3ff][b]Reality Score[/b][/color] represents your connection to truth.
[color=#ff66b3][b]Positive Energy[/b][/color] represents how much fuel the institution has left for its rituals.

Most cycles go through the same rhythm: prayer, disaster, concert, honeymoon period, then collapse again.

[i]Progress in this game is not about winning — it's about whether you survive long enough to understand the cycle.[/i]

[color=#777799][i]A note from the archives: In theory, higher Positive Energy accelerates the collapse of this world. But in practice — no matter how extreme the numbers grow — a single player's influence on the cosmos remains vanishingly small. From the universe's perspective, even the most catastrophic score barely registers as a whisper.

This game has no true ending: not because anyone forgot to add one, but because no score any player could ever achieve would be enough to actually tip the scales of reality. Those at FSM who lie awake dreading the approaching apocalypse are, cosmically speaking, not unlike someone convinced the sky will come crashing down tomorrow.[/i][/color]

en:
[color=#ff6b6b][b]FSM[/b][/color] stands for [b]Flying Spaghetti Monster[/b], the deity the Glorious Deliverance Agency worships as gospel truth.

Gloria believes that with enough faith and positive energy, fate can be reversed. The entire team treats this as sacred truth.

[b]The uncomfortable truth:[/b] FSM doesn't save anyone. People cling to it simply because 'believing something matters' is easier than staring into the void.

In this world, doubting FSM is seen as dangerous negative energy. Understanding this lie is part of understanding the entire game.
zh:
[color=#ff6b6b][b]FSM[/b][/color] 指的是 [b]飛天義大利麵神[/b]，也是光榮拯救機構奉為信條的存在。

Gloria 相信，只要信念夠強、正向能量夠高，就能扭轉命運。整個團隊都把這件事當成神聖真理。

[b]令人不安的真相：[/b]FSM 並不會拯救任何人。人們抓住祂，只是因為「相信一件事有意義」比直視虛無更容易。

在這個世界裡，懷疑 FSM 會被視為危險的負面能量。看懂這個謊言，也是理解整個遊戲的一部分。
de:
[color=#ff6b6b][b]FSM[/b][/color] stands for [b]Flying Spaghetti Monster[/b], the deity the Glorious Deliverance Agency worships as gospel truth.

Gloria believes that with enough faith and positive energy, fate can be reversed. The entire team treats this as sacred truth.

[b]The uncomfortable truth:[/b] FSM doesn't save anyone. People cling to it simply because 'believing something matters' is easier than staring into the void.

In this world, doubting FSM is seen as dangerous negative energy. Understanding this lie is part of understanding the entire game.

de: gloria_open_01: "Don't rush to explain — I just want to help cleanse your heart."

en: gloria_open_02: "I know you're in pain, but your pain is polluting the entire team."
zh: gloria_open_02: 我知道你很痛苦，但你的痛苦正在污染整個團隊。
de: gloria_open_02: "I know you're in pain, but your pain is polluting the entire team."

en: gloria_open_03: "You're not bad — just not positive enough yet. Let me correct you."
zh: gloria_open_03: 你不是壞，只是還不夠正面。讓我來矯正你。
de: gloria_open_03: "You're not bad — just not positive enough yet. Let me correct you."

en: gloria_open_04: "Breathe deep, smile, then admit your negative choice just now."
zh: gloria_open_04: 深呼吸，微笑，然後承認你剛才的負面選擇。
de: gloria_open_04: "Breathe deep, smile, then admit your negative choice just now."

en: [Trigger: Plays after the intervention text appears]
de: [Trigger: Plays after the intervention text appears]

en: gloria_guilt_01: "You think you were just complaining, but every denial makes your teammates lose faith..."
zh: gloria_guilt_01: 你以為你只是在抱怨，但每一句否定都在讓同伴失去信念...
de: gloria_guilt_01: "You think you were just complaining, but every denial makes your teammates lose faith..."

en: gloria_guilt_02: "I understand you're tired, but mature people don't throw their shadows onto others..."
zh: gloria_guilt_02: 我理解你累了，可成熟的人不會把陰影丟給別人...
de: gloria_guilt_02: "I understand you're tired, but mature people don't throw their shadows onto others..."

en: gloria_guilt_03: "You say you're being honest, but you're just packaging anxiety as truth..."
zh: gloria_guilt_03: 你說你很誠實，但你只是把焦慮包裝成真相...
de: gloria_guilt_03: "You say you're being honest, but you're just packaging anxiety as truth..."

en: gloria_guilt_04: "If you keep thinking this way, the damage won't be just yours..."
zh: gloria_guilt_04: 如果你繼續這樣想，受傷的不只你...
de: gloria_guilt_04: "If you keep thinking this way, the damage won't be just yours..."

en: gloria_guilt_05: "I'm not blaming you — I'm protecting you. Your negative cycle has already hurt everyone..."
zh: gloria_guilt_05: 我不是在責怪你，我是在保護你。你的負面循環已經傷害了每一個人...
de: gloria_guilt_05: "I'm not blaming you — I'm protecting you. Your negative cycle has already hurt everyone..."

en: gloria_guilt_06: "You keep reality on your lips, but you ignore that emotions are contagious..."
zh: gloria_guilt_06: 你把現實掛在嘴邊，但你忽略了情緒會傳染...
de: gloria_guilt_06: "You keep reality on your lips, but you ignore that emotions are contagious..."

en: gloria_guilt_07: "You say you're stating facts, yet your tone dismantles the team's last sense of safety..."
zh: gloria_guilt_07: 你說你只是在講事實，可你的語氣正在拆掉團隊最後一點安全感...
de: gloria_guilt_07: "You say you're stating facts, yet your tone dismantles the team's last sense of safety..."

en: gloria_guilt_08: "Every time you choose to doubt, the world gains one more measure of chaos..."
zh: gloria_guilt_08: 每一次你選擇質疑，世界就多一分混亂...
de: gloria_guilt_08: "Every time you choose to doubt, the world gains one more measure of chaos..."

en: gloria_pua_01: "You say you want change, but what you really want is to feel right..."
zh: gloria_pua_01: 你說你想改變，但你真正想要的只是感覺自己是對的...
de: gloria_pua_01: "You say you want change, but what you really want is to feel right..."

en: gloria_pua_02: "Every time you get angry, it's just your fear looking for an exit..."
zh: gloria_pua_02: 每次你發怒，只是你的恐懼在找出口...
de: gloria_pua_02: "Every time you get angry, it's just your fear looking for an exit..."

en: gloria_pua_03: "I know your past made you this way. That's why I'm still here trying to help."
zh: gloria_pua_03: 我知道你的過去讓你變成這樣。這就是為什麼我還在這裡試著幫你。
de: gloria_pua_03: "I know your past made you this way. That's why I'm still here trying to help."

en: gloria_pua_04: "The reason no one supports you isn't their fault — it's your energy field..."
zh: gloria_pua_04: 沒有人支持你，不是他們的問題，是你的能量場...
de: gloria_pua_04: "The reason no one supports you isn't their fault — it's your energy field..."

en: gloria_pua_05: "I forgive you. Most people wouldn't be so patient — but I'm different."
zh: gloria_pua_05: 我原諒你。大多數人不會這麼有耐心——但我不一樣。
de: gloria_pua_05: "I forgive you. Most people wouldn't be so patient — but I'm different."

en: gloria_pua_06: "If you really cared about this team, you wouldn't make us feel this way..."
zh: gloria_pua_06: 如果你真的在乎這個團隊，就不會讓我們有這種感覺...
de: gloria_pua_06: "If you really cared about this team, you wouldn't make us feel this way..."

en: gloria_pua_07: "I've watched you for a long time. You're capable of so much more — start by smiling."
zh: gloria_pua_07: 我觀察你很久了。你可以做得更好——從微笑開始。
de: gloria_pua_07: "I've watched you for a long time. You're capable of so much more — start by smiling."

en: gloria_pua_08: "Your logic isn't wrong, but logic without warmth just creates more wounds..."
zh: gloria_pua_08: 你的邏輯沒有錯，但沒有溫度的邏輯只會製造更多傷口...
de: gloria_pua_08: "Your logic isn't wrong, but logic without warmth just creates more wounds..."

en: gloria_pua_09: "I've been hurt too. But I choose to let the FSM carry it. You should try."
zh: gloria_pua_09: 我也受過傷。但我選擇讓飛天意粉神承擔。你也可以試試。
de: gloria_pua_09: "I've been hurt too. But I choose to let the FSM carry it. You should try."

en: gloria_pua_10: "I don't need you to agree. I just need you to stop hurting the people who love you."
zh: gloria_pua_10: 我不需要你認同我。我只需要你停止傷害愛你的人。
de: gloria_pua_10: "I don't need you to agree. I just need you to stop hurting the people who love you."

en: gloria_accept_01: "Good — willingness to admit is the beginning of change."
zh: gloria_accept_01: 很好，願意承認就是改變的開始。
de: gloria_accept_01: "Good — willingness to admit is the beginning of change."

en: gloria_accept_02: "Thank you for returning to the correct frequency — the team will be safer for it."
zh: gloria_accept_02: 謝謝你回到正確頻率，團隊會因此更安全。
de: gloria_accept_02: "Thank you for returning to the correct frequency — the team will be safer for it."

en: gloria_accept_03: "This is the you I know — willing to sacrifice your own feelings for the collective."
zh: gloria_accept_03: 這才是我認識的你，懂得為集體犧牲自己感受。
de: gloria_accept_03: "This is the you I know — willing to sacrifice your own feelings for the collective."

en: gloria_accept_04: "Perfection isn't required — just keep being positive."
zh: gloria_accept_04: 不需要完美，只需要持續正面。
de: gloria_accept_04: "Perfection isn't required — just keep being positive."

en: This demo shows dynamic font scaling and language switching.
zh: 此示範展示動態字體縮放與語言切換功能。
de: This demo shows dynamic font scaling and language switching.

en:
Welcome to the Glorious Deliverance Agency 1

You are a reluctant hero, forced to join a dysfunctional team trying to save the world with "positive energy."

The irony? Positive energy only accelerates the world's destruction.

Are you ready to face the absurd, the darkly humorous, and your teammates' "help"?
zh:
歡迎來到光榮拯救機構 1

你是一個被迫加入的英雄，被迫加入一個功能失調的團隊，他們試圖用「正能量」拯救世界。

諷刺的是？正能量只會加速世界的毀滅。

你準備好面對荒誕、黑色幽默和你隊友的「幫助」了嗎？
de:
Welcome to the Glorious Deliverance Agency 1

You are a reluctant hero, forced to join a dysfunctional team trying to save the world with "positive energy."

The irony? Positive energy only accelerates the world's destruction.

Are you ready to face the absurd, the darkly humorous, and your teammates' "help"?

en: Generate 8-12 lines of brainwashing concert lyrics for Teacher Chan.\nBackground: Title="%s", Events="%s". Style: sugar-coated cult positivity.\nImportant: Only return a raw JSON string array. Example: ["Smiling is duty","Love is an order"]
zh: 為陳老師洗腦演唱會生成 8-12 行歌詞。\n背景：標題="%s"，事件="%s"。風格：糖衣邪教正能量。\n重要：只回傳原始 JSON 字串列表。範例：["微笑是義務","愛是命令"]
de: Generate 8-12 lines of brainwashing concert lyrics for Teacher Chan.\nBackground: Title="%s", Events="%s". Style: sugar-coated cult positivity.\nImportant: Only return a raw JSON string array. Example: ["Smiling is duty","Love is an order"]

en: You are a game journal summary assistant.
zh: 你是一個遊戲日記摘要助手。
de: You are a game journal summary assistant.

en: Condense the following game story into a 10-30 word concise summary.
zh: 請將以下遊戲故事濃縮成 10-30 個字的精簡摘要。
de: Condense the following game story into a 10-30 word concise summary.

en: Output only the summary text, without any punctuation, quotes, or extra explanation.
zh: 只輸出摘要文字，不要加任何標點符號、引號或額外說明。
de: Output only the summary text, without any punctuation, quotes, or extra explanation.

en: Only return valid JSON (UTF-8, double quotes), no Markdown, code blocks, or extra explanations.
zh: 只回傳有效的 JSON（UTF-8、雙引號），不要有 Markdown、程式碼框或額外說明。
de: Only return valid JSON (UTF-8, double quotes), no Markdown, code blocks, or extra explanations.

en: Even if missing context, output exactly %d suggestions, filling in empty strings when data is missing.
zh: 即使缺少脈絡，也要輸出剛好 %d 則建議，缺資料時以空字串填入。
de: Even if missing context, output exactly %d suggestions, filling in empty strings when data is missing.

en: Each suggestion must be under %d words, closely tied to the provided events and stats.
zh: 每則建議需少於 %d 個字，緊扣提供的事件與數值。
de: Each suggestion must be under %d words, closely tied to the provided events and stats.

en: Maintain a tone of dark empathetic reflection, avoiding emoji, hashtags, and unnecessary filler.
zh: 語氣保持黑色同理的反思，避免表情符號、標籤與多餘贅詞。
de: Maintain a tone of dark empathetic reflection, avoiding emoji, hashtags, and unnecessary filler.

en: 'Seeing these negative comments in the diary makes me very uncomfortable. What you did feels like talking behind my back while making sure I know about it.'
zh: 「看到日記上的這些負面言論讓我感到非常不舒服。你這樣做，感覺像是『俾你背面但係又俾我知咁鬧緊我』。」
de: 'Seeing these negative comments in the diary makes me very uncomfortable. What you did feels like talking behind my back while making sure I know about it.'

en: Warning: High entropy increases the risk of timeline collapse. Maintain your reality perception.
zh: 警告：高熵值會增加時間線崩潰的風險。請保持你的現實感知。
de: Warning: High entropy increases the risk of timeline collapse. Maintain your reality perception.

en: Cognitive Dissonance: Your mind forces you to add positive energy words!
zh: 認知失調：你的思維強迫你添加正能量詞彙！
de: Cognitive Dissonance: Your mind forces you to add positive energy words!

en:
[IMPORTANT STATE: HONEYMOON PHASE]
We are in the 'Honeymoon Phase'. Teammates are acting suspiciously cooperative, helpful, and kind.
Do NOT generate sabotage. Instead, make them execute orders 'too perfectly', creating an eerie sense of calm before the storm.
zh:
[重要狀態：蜜月期]
目前處於「蜜月期」。隊友們表現得異常合作、體貼且樂於助人（甚至有點令人發毛）。
請不要讓他們搞砸任務，而是讓他們「過度完美」地執行指令，營造一種暴風雨前的寧靜。
de:
[IMPORTANT STATE: HONEYMOON PHASE]
We are in the 'Honeymoon Phase'. Teammates are acting suspiciously cooperative, helpful, and kind.
Do NOT generate sabotage. Instead, make them execute orders 'too perfectly', creating an eerie sense of calm before the storm.

en:
Please generate:
1. Scene description (350-500 words)
2. Mission objective
3. Potential dilemmas or challenges

Maintain dark humor and satirical tone. Be vivid and detailed in your descriptions, including environmental details, character interactions, and atmosphere building.

Inside the story_text, finish with a short "Choice Preview" block that contains 3 to 5 lines labeled with [Cautious], [Balanced], [Reckless], [Positive], or [Complain]. Each line must be 10-20 words describing the consequence of choosing that route.
All preview lines must be present and mirror the JSON choices summaries.
zh:
請生成：
1. 場景描述（350-500字）
2. 任務目標
3. 潛在困境或挑戰

請在黑色幽默的基調下生成內容。描述要生動詳細，包含環境細節、角色互動和氛圍營造。

story_text 內文最後必須加入「選項預告」段落：包含 3 到 5 行，分別以 [謹慎]、[權衡]、[瘋狂]、[樂觀] 或 [抱怨] 開頭，每行 10-20 字描述該選項的後續走向。
這些預告文字必須存在且與 JSON choices 陣列的 summary 完全對應。
de:
Please generate:
1. Scene description (350-500 words)
2. Mission objective
3. Potential dilemmas or challenges

Maintain dark humor and satirical tone. Be vivid and detailed in your descriptions, including environmental details, character interactions, and atmosphere building.

Inside the story_text, finish with a short "Choice Preview" block that contains 3 to 5 lines labeled with [Cautious], [Balanced], [Reckless], [Positive], or [Complain]. Each line must be 10-20 words describing the consequence of choosing that route.
All preview lines must be present and mirror the JSON choices summaries.

en:
**IMPORTANT: Respond with EXACTLY one valid JSON object. Do not add prose outside the JSON.**
Use this schema (keep lowercase keys):
{
  "mission_title": "<Creative Chapter Title>",
  "scene": {"background": "<background_id>", "atmosphere": "<tone>", "lighting": "<lighting_note>"},
  "characters": {
    "protagonist": {"expression": "<expression>"},
    "gloria": {"expression": "<expression>"},
    "donkey": {"expression": "<expression>"},
    "ark": {"expression": "<expression>"},
    "one": {"expression": "<expression>"}
  },
  "relationships": [
    {"source": "gloria", "target": "player", "status": "Disappointed", "value_change": -5},
    {"source": "donkey", "target": "ark", "status": "Fighting", "value_change": 0}
  ],
  "story_text": "<350-500 word darkly comic scene>",
  "choices": [
    {"archetype": "cautious", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "balanced", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "reckless", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "positive", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "complain", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]}
  ]
}
All five main characters are always on screen. Provide an expression for each, even if silent.
Background must be chosen from: ruins, cave, dungeon, forest, temple, laboratory, library, throne_room, battlefield, crystal_cavern, bridge, garden, portal_area, safe_zone, water, fire_area
Expressions must be one of: neutral, happy, sad, angry, confused, shocked, thinking, embarrassed
relationships is optional. If the story shifts how characters see each other (e.g., Disappointed, Worships, Hates), list them here.
mission_title must be a short, darkly humorous title for this chapter.
Match the background and expressions to the mission tone. Use the exact IDs from the list (e.g., fire_area).

CHOICE OUTPUT RULES:
- Provide 3 to 5 choices using any mix of archetype IDs: cautious, balanced, reckless, positive, complain.
- Summaries must preview how the story shifts if the player picks that option (10-20 words).
- Keep the summary in the same language as the story_text.
**Butterfly Effect System**: Each choice MUST include "predicted_consequences" array (1-3 predicted consequences). Each consequence needs:
  - description: Brief description of the consequence (20-40 words)
  - severity: Severity level (low/medium/high)
  - trigger_in_scenes: How many scenes later it triggers (suggest 3-8 scenes)
These predicted consequences will potentially trigger in future scenes, creating butterfly effects. Ensure consequences match the choice type and context.
- The story_text must repeat these summaries as [ArchetypeLabel] preview lines so the UI can fall back; missing JSON choices or preview lines makes the mission invalid.
zh:
**重要：回應必須是有效 JSON 物件，且不可包含額外文字或 Markdown。**
輸出結構如下（保留小寫鍵名）：
{
  "mission_title": "<章節標題>",
  "scene": {"background": "<背景ID>", "atmosphere": "<氛圍簡述>", "lighting": "<燈光描述>"},
  "characters": {
    "protagonist": {"expression": "<表情>"},
    "gloria": {"expression": "<表情>"},
    "donkey": {"expression": "<表情>"},
    "ark": {"expression": "<表情>"},
    "one": {"expression": "<表情>"}
  },
  "relationships": [
    {"source": "gloria", "target": "player", "status": "失望", "value_change": -5},
    {"source": "donkey", "target": "ark", "status": "爭吵", "value_change": 0}
  ],
  "story_text": "<350-500 字的黑色幽默正文>",
  "choices": [
    {"archetype": "cautious", "summary": "<10-20 字描述選擇後走向>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<後果描述>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "balanced", "summary": "<10-20 字描述選擇後走向>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<後果描述>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "reckless", "summary": "<10-20 字描述選擇後走向>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<後果描述>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "positive", "summary": "<10-20 字描述選擇後走向>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<後果描述>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "complain", "summary": "<10-20 字描述選擇後走向>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<後果描述>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]}
  ]
}
背景必須選自：ruins, cave, dungeon, forest, temple, laboratory, library, throne_room, battlefield, crystal_cavern, bridge, garden, portal_area, safe_zone, water, fire_area
表情必須選自：neutral, happy, sad, angry, confused, shocked, thinking, embarrassed
所有五位主要角色皆需設定表情,即使未說話。背景請與劇情氛圍相符，並使用提供的 ID。
relationships 為可選欄位，若情節導致角色間的狀態改變（如：失望、崇拜、敵視），請在此列出。
mission_title 必須是該章節的標題，充滿黑色幽默或諷刺意味。
同時輸出 "choices" 陣列：請提供 3 到 5 個選項，可混合使用 cautious、balanced、reckless、positive（樂觀）、complain（抱怨）這些類型。summary 需以與正文相同語言、10-20 字預告該選擇的走向。
**蝴蝶效應系統**：每個選擇必須包含 "predicted_consequences" 陣列（1-3個預測後果）。每個後果需包含：
  - description: 簡短描述該後果（20-40字）
  - severity: 嚴重程度 (low/medium/high)
  - trigger_in_scenes: 幾場景後觸發（建議3-8場景）
這些預測後果將在未來的場景中可能被觸發，形成蝴蝶效應。請確保後果與選擇的類型和情境相符。
story_text 中的 [謹慎]/[權衡]/[瘋狂]/[樂觀]/[抱怨] 預告行必須與 choices 陣列的 summary 一一對應，缺少任何一項都視為無效結果。
de:
**IMPORTANT: Respond with EXACTLY one valid JSON object. Do not add prose outside the JSON.**
Use this schema (keep lowercase keys):
{
  "mission_title": "<Creative Chapter Title>",
  "scene": {"background": "<background_id>", "atmosphere": "<tone>", "lighting": "<lighting_note>"},
  "characters": {
    "protagonist": {"expression": "<expression>"},

  "choices": [

    {"archetype": "balanced", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "reckless", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "positive", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]},
    {"archetype": "complain", "summary": "<10-20 word consequence preview>", "predicted_consequences": [{"description": "<consequence description>", "severity": "low|medium|high", "trigger_in_scenes": 3}]}
  ]
}
All five main characters are always on screen. Provide an expression for each, even if silent.
Background must be chosen from: ruins, cave, dungeon, forest, temple, laboratory, library, throne_room, battlefield, crystal_cavern, bridge, garden, portal_area, safe_zone, water, fire_area
Expressions must be one of: neutral, happy, sad, angry, confused, shocked, thinking, embarrassed
relationships is optional. If the story shifts how characters see each other (e.g., Disappointed, Worships, Hates), list them here.
mission_title must be a short, darkly humorous title for this chapter.
Match the background and expressions to the mission tone. Use the exact IDs from the list (e.g., fire_area).

CHOICE OUTPUT RULES:
- Provide 3 to 5 choices using any mix of archetype IDs: cautious, balanced, reckless, positive, complain.
- Summaries must preview how the story shifts if the player picks that option (10-20 words).
- Keep the summary in the same language as the story_text.
**Butterfly Effect System**: Each choice MUST include "predicted_consequences" array (1-3 predicted consequences). Each consequence needs:
  - description: Brief description of the consequence (20-40 words)
  - severity: Severity level (low/medium/high)
  - trigger_in_scenes: How many scenes later it triggers (suggest 3-8 scenes)
These predicted consequences will potentially trigger in future scenes, creating butterfly effects. Ensure consequences match the choice type and context.
- The story_text must repeat these summaries as [ArchetypeLabel] preview lines so the UI can fall back; missing JSON choices or preview lines makes the mission invalid.

en:
[SYSTEM: DEBUG MODE ACTIVE]
Regardless of story context, you MUST force the end of the current chapter.
Set "mission_status" to "complete" in the SCENE_DIRECTIVES.
Write an abrupt ending or twist to conclude the mission immediately.
zh:
[SYSTEM: DEBUG MODE ACTIVE]
無論故事進展如何，你必須強制結束當前章節。
請在 SCENE_DIRECTIVES 中將 "mission_status" 設為 "complete"。
請撰寫一個突如其來的結局或轉折來結束本章。
de:
[SYSTEM: DEBUG MODE ACTIVE]
Regardless of story context, you MUST force the end of the current chapter.
Set "mission_status" to "complete" in the SCENE_DIRECTIVES.
Write an abrupt ending or twist to conclude the mission immediately.

en: This is the game's opening scene. The player has just joined GDA1.
zh: 這是遊戲的第一個場景。玩家剛剛加入 GDA1（光榮拯救機構1）。
de: This is the game's opening scene. The player has just joined GDA1.

en: Generate an engaging opening introduction (200-300 words) with world, agency, teammates, and player role.
zh: 請生成一個引人入勝的開場介紹（200-300字），包含世界觀、機構、隊友和玩家角色。
de: Generate an engaging opening introduction (200-300 words) with world, agency, teammates, and player role.

keys: # Narrative Prompt Builder - Intro JSON Schema

en: Gloria convened an emergency meeting at 3am to announce that the team must install exactly 300 pastel light bulbs inside the underground shelter so despair will reflect less off the concrete walls. She has already ordered them in bulk. Delivery is in four hours. The shelter's electrical system was rated for 1987.
zh: Gloria 在凌晨三點召開緊急會議，宣布團隊必須在地下避難所內安裝恰好 300 顆粉彩燈泡，這樣絕望就不會從混凝土牆上反射出來。她已經批量訂購了。四小時後交貨。避難所的電氣系統評級是 1987 年的。
de: Gloria convened an emergency meeting at 3am to announce that the team must install exactly 300 pastel light bulbs inside the underground shelter so despair will reflect less off the concrete walls. She has already ordered them in bulk. Delivery is in four hours. The shelter's electrical system was rated for 1987.

en: Donkey announced in the city square from atop a kiosk that today's schedule ends definitively with a royal rescue, even though no royalty lives here, has ever lived here, or was ever mentioned in any official census. He has already invited the press. They are waiting. Reality is not.
zh: Donkey 在城市廣場的報攤上宣布，今天的日程以皇室救援結束，儘管這裡沒有皇室居住，從未居住過，也從未在任何官方人口普查中提及。他已經邀請了媒體。他們在等待。現實沒有。
de: Donkey announced in the city square from atop a kiosk that today's schedule ends definitively with a royal rescue, even though no royalty lives here, has ever lived here, or was ever mentioned in any official census. He has already invited the press. They are waiting. Reality is not.

en: ARK printed a forty page checklist that must be completed in order, signed in triplicate, and notarized before anyone is allowed to speak to the locals. The checklist itself is three pages long. The signature page is four pages. Page 28 contains only the words 'VERIFY PREVIOUS PAGE' with no other context. You have two hours.
zh: ARK 列印了一份四十頁的清單，必須按順序完成、一式三份簽名並公證，然後才能與當地人交談。清單本身長達三頁。簽名頁有四頁。第 28 頁僅包含「驗證前一頁」字樣，沒有其他上下文。你有兩個小時。
de: ARK printed a forty page checklist that must be completed in order, signed in triplicate, and notarized before anyone is allowed to speak to the locals. The checklist itself is three pages long. The signature page is four pages. Page 28 contains only the words 'VERIFY PREVIOUS PAGE' with no other context. You have two hours.

en: One quietly stocked the community kitchen with enough food for three weeks, but the others misinterpreted the gesture and planned an elaborate televised celebration feast. The media trucks are already here. One is watching from the corner, hoping nobody asks him to make a speech.
zh: One 悄悄地在社區廚房儲存了足夠三週的食物，但其他人誤解了這個手勢，計劃了一場精心策劃的電視慶祝盛宴。媒體卡車已經到了。One 在角落裡看著，希望沒有人要求他發表演講。
de: One quietly stocked the community kitchen with enough food for three weeks, but the others misinterpreted the gesture and planned an elaborate televised celebration feast. The media trucks are already here. One is watching from the corner, hoping nobody asks him to make a speech.

en: The Agency was assigned to staff a positivity kiosk in the wreckage of a community center that collapsed forty-eight hours ago. The kiosk is fully stocked. The forms are pre-printed. The waiting area has chairs arranged in an encouraging semicircle. Nobody has been cleared to enter the building. This is not considered an obstacle by Gloria.
zh: 特工署被派去在四十八小時前倒塌的社區中心廢墟中設立積極性服務臺。服務臺已滿員配置，表格都印好了，等候區的椅子擺成鼓舞人心的半圓形。還沒有人獲准進入這棟建築物。Gloria 不覺得這是個問題。
de: The Agency was assigned to staff a positivity kiosk in the wreckage of a community center that collapsed forty-eight hours ago. The kiosk is fully stocked. The forms are pre-printed. The waiting area has chairs arranged in an encouraging semicircle. Nobody has been cleared to enter the building. This is not considered an obstacle by Gloria.

en: Gloria scheduled a team morale photo shoot at precisely the moment the evacuation order was issued. She has already arranged the aesthetic and booked the photographer. The evacuation route runs directly through the backdrop. This is also the backdrop's best angle.
zh: Gloria 在疏散令發布的同一時刻安排了一場提升士氣的團隊拍攝。她已規劃好美學風格並預約攝影師。疏散路線直接穿過背景板。這也是背景板最好看的角度。
de: Gloria scheduled a team morale photo shoot at precisely the moment the evacuation order was issued. She has already arranged the aesthetic and booked the photographer. The evacuation route runs directly through the backdrop. This is also the backdrop's best angle.

en: Donkey announced at the briefing that he had already resolved the primary crisis by redistributing the problem to neighboring districts. He has documents. They have his signature. The neighboring districts were not consulted. This is described in his report as proactive delegation.
zh: Donkey 在簡報會上宣布他已把主要危機分配給鄰近行政區，問題已解決。他有文件，文件有他的簽名。鄰近行政區沒有被諮詢過。他的報告將此稱為「主動授權」。
de: Donkey announced at the briefing that he had already resolved the primary crisis by redistributing the problem to neighboring districts. He has documents. They have his signature. The neighboring districts were not consulted. This is described in his report as proactive delegation.

en: Teacher Chan has scheduled a forty-five minute mandatory mindfulness session to begin in seven minutes, at the exact midpoint of the crisis response window. Attendance is not optional. The session covers breathing techniques and present-moment awareness. Absent from the curriculum: any actual crisis response training.
zh: 陳老師安排了一場四十五分鐘的強制正念課程，將在七分鐘後開始，恰好是危機響應窗口的正中央。出席不是選擇性的。課程涵蓋呼吸技巧和當下意識。課程明顯缺席的：任何實際的危機響應訓練。
de: Teacher Chan has scheduled a forty-five minute mandatory mindfulness session to begin in seven minutes, at the exact midpoint of the crisis response window. Attendance is not optional. The session covers breathing techniques and present-moment awareness. Absent from the curriculum: any actual crisis response training.

en: The weather forecast predicts both sunshine and torrential rain simultaneously in the same location.
zh: 天氣預報預測同一地點會同時出現陽光和暴雨。
de: The weather forecast predicts both sunshine and torrential rain simultaneously in the same location.

en: A documentary crew has been following your team for three days without permission and refuses to leave.
zh: 一個紀錄片團隊未經許可跟蹤你的團隊三天並拒絕離開。
de: A documentary crew has been following your team for three days without permission and refuses to leave.

en: The local government changed all the rules thirty minutes ago but hasn't informed anyone yet.
zh: 地方政府在三十分鐘前改變了所有規則，但還沒有通知任何人。
de: The local government changed all the rules thirty minutes ago but hasn't informed anyone yet.

en: Three separate volunteer groups have conflicting interpretations of what needs to happen.
zh: 三個不同的志願者團體對應該發生的事情有相互矛盾的解釋。
de: Three separate volunteer groups have conflicting interpretations of what needs to happen.

en: The backup plan was shredded by ARK thirty minutes ago on the grounds that it had not been reviewed by the appropriate sub-committee.
zh: 備用計劃三十分鐘前被 ARK 銷毀，理由是它尚未經過適當的小組委員會審查。
de: The backup plan was shredded by ARK thirty minutes ago on the grounds that it had not been reviewed by the appropriate sub-committee.

en: Three senior officials have been arguing about the legal definition of "emergency" for the last forty minutes and cannot proceed until they reach consensus.
zh: 三位高級官員就「緊急情況」的法律定義爭論了四十分鐘，在達成共識之前無法繼續推進。
de: Three senior officials have been arguing about the legal definition of "emergency" for the last forty minutes and cannot proceed until they reach consensus.

en: The motivational posters were printed upside-down and laminated before anyone noticed, and no one in the chain of command is willing to authorize replacing them.
zh: 激勵海報被倒著印出來後又進行了覆膜，在任何人注意到之前，指揮鏈中沒有人願意授權更換。
de: The motivational posters were printed upside-down and laminated before anyone noticed, and no one in the chain of command is willing to authorize replacing them.

en: An automated wellness chatbot has been sending celebratory confetti notifications to the evacuation zone for the past six hours and cannot be disabled without administrator access that no one currently possesses.
zh: 一個自動健康聊天機器人過去六小時一直向疏散區發送慶祝彩帶通知，在沒有任何人目前擁有的管理員訪問權限的情況下無法禁用。
de: An automated wellness chatbot has been sending celebratory confetti notifications to the evacuation zone for the past six hours and cannot be disabled without administrator access that no one currently possesses.

en: Every forced smile raises the entropy monitor by another red bar. The monitoring equipment was never meant for human emotion tracking. It was meant for industrial furnaces. It is malfunctioning.
zh: 每一個被迫的微笑都會使熵監視器再增加一個紅條。監測設備從來不是用於人類情感追蹤的。它是用於工業熔爐的。它出了故障。
de: Every forced smile raises the entropy monitor by another red bar. The monitoring equipment was never meant for human emotion tracking. It was meant for industrial furnaces. It is malfunctioning.

en: A live broadcast counts down to your miracle while the signal desyncs into ghostly echoes of previous conversations you didn't know were being recorded. Gloria is taking notes. The Council is watching. Both are disappointed.
zh: 現場直播倒數計時到你的奇蹟，而信號不同步成為你不知道被錄製的先前對話的幽靈回聲。Gloria 在做筆記。議會在看。兩者都很失望。
de: A live broadcast counts down to your miracle while the signal desyncs into ghostly echoes of previous conversations you didn't know were being recorded. Gloria is taking notes. The Council is watching. Both are disappointed.

en: Positive affirmations melt the nearby machines into syrupy sludge, the coffee maker, the printers, the air conditioning unit. Maintenance is not amused. The bill will come later. They always do.
zh: 積極的肯定將附近的機器融化成糖漿般的污泥，咖啡機、打印機、空調。維護人員並不覺得好笑。帳單會在稍後到來。他們總是這樣。
de: Positive affirmations melt the nearby machines into syrupy sludge, the coffee maker, the printers, the air conditioning unit. Maintenance is not amused. The bill will come later. They always do.

en: Gloria streams your every moment and the comments demand that you repent twice, once for the failure, and once for the audacity of trying in the first place. Her chat is very honest about its assessment of your character.
zh: Gloria 直播你的每一刻，評論要求你懺悔兩次，一次是為了失敗，一次是為了嘗試的大膽。她的聊天室對你的性格評估非常誠實。
de: Gloria streams your every moment and the comments demand that you repent twice, once for the failure, and once for the audacity of trying in the first place. Her chat is very honest about its assessment of your character.

en: The emergency hotline was quietly rerouted to Gloria's personal voicemail three weeks ago without notification. She has 847 unheard messages. She considers this impressive engagement.
zh: 三週前，緊急熱線悄悄被重新路由到 Gloria 的個人語音信箱，沒有通知。她有 847 條未聽取的消息。她認為這是令人印象深刻的參與度。
de: The emergency hotline was quietly rerouted to Gloria's personal voicemail three weeks ago without notification. She has 847 unheard messages. She considers this impressive engagement.

en: Donkey has been secretly recording every complaint and mislabeling each one as evidence of excellent team morale. The archive is growing. It will be admissible.
zh: Donkey 一直在偷偷錄製每一個抱怨，並將每個錄音錯誤標記為「卓越團隊士氣的證明」。存檔在增長。它將是可受理的。
de: Donkey has been secretly recording every complaint and mislabeling each one as evidence of excellent team morale. The archive is growing. It will be admissible.

en: The official mission brief was updated twice while you were reading the previous version, and both updates contradict each other in ways that invalidate any approach taken so far.
zh: 當你正在閱讀上一版時，官方任務簡報已更新了兩次，兩次更新相互矛盾，使迄今為止採取的任何方式都失效了。
de: The official mission brief was updated twice while you were reading the previous version, and both updates contradict each other in ways that invalidate any approach taken so far.

en: ARK has determined that your proposed solution requires a seventeen-step review process and cannot be implemented until all steps are completed and countersigned by personnel who are currently unreachable.
zh: ARK 確定你提出的解決方案需要十七步審查程序，在所有步驟完成並由目前無法聯繫的人員副署之前無法實施。
de: ARK has determined that your proposed solution requires a seventeen-step review process and cannot be implemented until all steps are completed and countersigned by personnel who are currently unreachable.

en: Convince the patrol captain that this is not a cult parade and that you have legitimate permits for the gathering, even though you don't actually have permits, and even though it does look exactly like a cult parade.
zh: 說服巡邏隊長這不是邪教遊行，你有合法的集會許可證，儘管你實際上沒有許可證，儘管它看起來確實就像邪教遊行。
de: Convince the patrol captain that this is not a cult parade and that you have legitimate permits for the gathering, even though you don't actually have permits, and even though it does look exactly like a cult parade.

en: Stop Donkey from repackaging demolition charges as romantic fireworks before he sells them to civilians, because the civil lawsuits are expensive and the insurance policy explicitly excludes intentional stupidity.
zh: 阻止 Donkey 將拆除炸藥重新包裝成浪漫煙花並出售給平民，因為民事訴訟很昂貴，而且保險單明確排除了故意愚蠢。
de: Stop Donkey from repackaging demolition charges as romantic fireworks before he sells them to civilians, because the civil lawsuits are expensive and the insurance policy explicitly excludes intentional stupidity.

en: Find at least one citizen who actually needs help and can articulate the need before Teacher Chan claims the credit for solving problems that didn't exist.
zh: 在 Teacher Chan 聲稱解決不存在的問題之前，至少找到一位真正需要幫助並能表達需求的公民。
de: Find at least one citizen who actually needs help and can articulate the need before Teacher Chan claims the credit for solving problems that didn't exist.

en: Keep whatever remains of your reality score from being completely drained by mandatory group hugs and team bonding exercises that Gloria insists build trust but actually cause mild trauma.
zh: 防止你剩餘的現實分數被強制性的集體擁抱和團隊建設練習完全耗盡，Gloria 堅持認為這建立了信任，但實際上造成了輕微的創傷。
de: Keep whatever remains of your reality score from being completely drained by mandatory group hugs and team bonding exercises that Gloria insists build trust but actually cause mild trauma.

en: Recover the mission briefing from Donkey before he finishes eating it during what he calls a trust exercise involving the literal internalization of objectives.
zh: 在 Donkey 以「字面上內化目標的信任練習」為由把任務簡報吃掉之前，設法奪回它。
de: Recover the mission briefing from Donkey before he finishes eating it during what he calls a trust exercise involving the literal internalization of objectives.

en: Get one teammate to abandon their personal brand side-project for sixty consecutive seconds in order to assist with the actual declared emergency.
zh: 讓一名隊友放棄他們的個人品牌副項目整整六十秒，以便協助處理實際宣告的緊急情況。
de: Get one teammate to abandon their personal brand side-project for sixty consecutive seconds in order to assist with the actual declared emergency.

en: Complete the official report without Gloria intercepting it and reframing your incident documentation as a heartwarming content opportunity with her name in the byline.
zh: 完成官方報告，不讓 Gloria 截取它並將你的事件記錄重新包裝為她的署名下的暖心內容機會。
de: Complete the official report without Gloria intercepting it and reframing your incident documentation as a heartwarming content opportunity with her name in the byline.

en: Finish the assigned task before Teacher Chan convenes an emergency debrief on whether the task was emotionally sustainable enough to have been attempted at all.
zh: 在陳老師召開緊急事後匯報——討論這項任務在情感上是否可持續到值得嘗試——之前完成指定任務。
de: Finish the assigned task before Teacher Chan convenes an emergency debrief on whether the task was emotionally sustainable enough to have been attempted at all.

en: Reminder: the harder you try, the faster the world burns.
zh: 提醒：你越努力，世界燃燒得越快。
de: Reminder: the harder you try, the faster the world burns.

en: Just as the guard nods and the situation stabilizes, Donkey bursts onto the scene and launches into an impromptu victory speech about saving invisible princesses from an interdimensional threat. Security is called. The moment is lost. Glory is complicated.
zh: 就在警衛點頭、情勢穩定時，Donkey 突然闖入現場，發表即興勝利演說，聲稱拯救了跨維度威脅下的隱形公主。保安被叫來了。時機失去了。榮耀變複雜了。
de: Just as the guard nods and the situation stabilizes, Donkey bursts onto the scene and launches into an impromptu victory speech about saving invisible princesses from an interdimensional threat. Security is called. The moment is lost. Glory is complicated.

en: The plan almost works, you can feel it succeeding, the positive energy building, until Gloria interrupts and requests a gratitude circle live on air so everyone can affirm their mutual success. By the time the circle ends thirty minutes later, the original problem has escalated and compounded.
zh: 計劃幾乎奏效，你能感覺到它成功了，正能量在積聚，直到 Gloria 打斷並要求在直播中進行感恩圈，以便每個人都能確認彼此的成功。當圈子在三十分鐘後結束時，原來的問題已經升級和複雜化了。
de: The plan almost works, you can feel it succeeding, the positive energy building, until Gloria interrupts and requests a gratitude circle live on air so everyone can affirm their mutual success. By the time the circle ends thirty minutes later, the original problem has escalated and compounded.

en: Success feels palpable until ARK realizes the solution violates section 7B of the official procedures, requiring immediate documentation revision before the success can be counted as legitimate.
zh: 成功似乎觸手可及，直到 ARK 意識到該解決方案違反了官方程序的第 7B 條，需要立即進行文件修訂才能將成功計為合法。
de: Success feels palpable until ARK realizes the solution violates section 7B of the official procedures, requiring immediate documentation revision before the success can be counted as legitimate.

en: The breakthrough lasts approximately four minutes before Gloria rebrands it as the centerpiece of her upcoming motivational retreat, commercializing your success so efficiently that your contribution is retroactively reclassified as content creation.
zh: 突破持續了大約四分鐘，Gloria 便將其重新定義為她即將舉辦的激勵靜修會的核心主題，如此有效率地商業化你的成功，以至於你的貢獻被追溯地重新歸類為內容創作。
de: The breakthrough lasts approximately four minutes before Gloria rebrands it as the centerpiece of her upcoming motivational retreat, commercializing your success so efficiently that your contribution is retroactively reclassified as content creation.

en: Something goes correctly for the first time in recorded memory, which immediately triggers ARK's anomaly detection protocol. He spends three hours auditing the success for procedural violations, and by the time he clears it, the window to capitalize on it has closed.
zh: 有記錄以來某件事第一次正確進行，這立即觸發了 ARK 的異常偵測協議。他花了三個小時審計成功是否存在程序違規，等他確認清楚時，利用它的窗口已經關閉了。
de: Something goes correctly for the first time in recorded memory, which immediately triggers ARK's anomaly detection protocol. He spends three hours auditing the success for procedural violations, and by the time he clears it, the window to capitalize on it has closed.

en: The moment you stumble, the team begins passing blame like a hot potato, each person carefully documenting their objections for the inevitable inquiry later. One apologizes to you privately but is already drafting his explanation to Gloria.
zh: 當你失足的那一刻，團隊開始像傳燙手山芋一樣傳遞責備，每個人都仔細記錄他們的反對意見，以備稍後不可避免的調查。One 私下向你道歉，但已經在起草他對 Gloria 的解釋。
de: The moment you stumble, the team begins passing blame like a hot potato, each person carefully documenting their objections for the inevitable inquiry later. One apologizes to you privately but is already drafting his explanation to Gloria.

en: Logic flickers out completely as positive slogans rain down like confetti from Gloria's social media network. The comments section becomes a tribunal. Your mistakes are now immortalized in multiple mediums.
zh: 邏輯完全閃爍，積極的口號像五彩紙屑一樣從 Gloria 的社交媒體網絡中傾瀉而下。評論區變成了法庭。你的錯誤現在已經在多種媒介中永垂不朽。
de: Logic flickers out completely as positive slogans rain down like confetti from Gloria's social media network. The comments section becomes a tribunal. Your mistakes are now immortalized in multiple mediums.

en: The failure triggers a chain reaction of team recriminations, with each member blaming the specific decision they opposed most vocally, thereby absolving themselves of responsibility while reinforcing their personal narrative of prescience.
zh: 失敗引發了一連串的團隊指責，每個成員都指責他們最強烈反對的特定決定，從而免除自己的責任，同時加強他們個人的先見之明敘事。
de: The failure triggers a chain reaction of team recriminations, with each member blaming the specific decision they opposed most vocally, thereby absolving themselves of responsibility while reinforcing their personal narrative of prescience.

en: The failure is so photogenic that Teacher Chan photographs it for a lesson module on adversity. By morning it appears in seventeen motivational decks and you are cited as an anonymous resilience case study whose name has been respectfully omitted.
zh: 失敗看起來如此上鏡，以至於陳老師為一個關於逆境的課程模組拍攝了它。到早上，它出現在十七個激勵演示文稿中，你被引用為「一個已尊重省略姓名的匿名韌性案例研究」。
de: The failure is so photogenic that Teacher Chan photographs it for a lesson module on adversity. By morning it appears in seventeen motivational decks and you are cited as an anonymous resilience case study whose name has been respectfully omitted.

en: Donkey reframes your failure as calculated risk-taking and pitches the story to three separate media outlets before you learn it happened. None of them contact you for comment. Your humiliation is currently being formatted as inspirational content.
zh: Donkey 在你知情之前就將你的失敗重新定義為有計算的冒險，並向三家不同的媒體推銷這個故事。沒有一家聯繫你徵求評論。你的羞辱目前正在被格式化為激勵內容。
de: Donkey reframes your failure as calculated risk-taking and pitches the story to three separate media outlets before you learn it happened. None of them contact you for comment. Your humiliation is currently being formatted as inspirational content.

en: Donkey hijacks the conversation to advertise his heroic memoir, 'Donkey: A Story of Impossible Choices,' with a self-published link he pulls from his pocket. He has copies. He is selling them.
zh: Donkey 劫持了對話來宣傳他的英雄回憶錄《Donkey：不可能的選擇的故事》，並從口袋裡掏出自出版的鏈接。他有副本。他在賣。
de: Donkey hijacks the conversation to advertise his heroic memoir, 'Donkey: A Story of Impossible Choices,' with a self-published link he pulls from his pocket. He has copies. He is selling them.

en: ARK issues seventeen alternate flow charts showing how the situation should have been handled and demands signatures in triplicate, including notarization, on each one. He has been preparing these charts since before the mission began.
zh: ARK 發布了十七個備用流程圖，顯示應該如何處理這種情況，並要求在每個流程圖上一式三份簽名，包括公證。他在任務開始之前就一直在準備這些圖表。
de: ARK issues seventeen alternate flow charts showing how the situation should have been handled and demands signatures in triplicate, including notarization, on each one. He has been preparing these charts since before the mission began.

en: Gloria claims your concern about the complications wounded her aura deeply and asks the crowd to form a spontaneous comfort circle around her while she processes the emotional injury. Your problem is now secondary to her recovery.
zh: Gloria 聲稱你對併發症的擔憂深深傷害了她的光環，並要求人群在她處理情緒傷害時在她周圍形成一個自發的安慰圈。你的問題現在對她的康復來說是次要的。
de: Gloria claims your concern about the complications wounded her aura deeply and asks the crowd to form a spontaneous comfort circle around her while she processes the emotional injury. Your problem is now secondary to her recovery.

en: One messages you privately with genuine support and validation, telling you your instincts were correct. He then tells the group he has no particular opinion, allowing your argument to die under the weight of collective silence.
zh: One 私下給你發消息，表示真誠的支持和認可，告訴你你的直覺是正確的。然後他告訴小組他沒有特別的意見，讓你的論點在集體沉默的重壓下死去。
de: One messages you privately with genuine support and validation, telling you your instincts were correct. He then tells the group he has no particular opinion, allowing your argument to die under the weight of collective silence.

en: Teacher Chan distributes a structured reflection worksheet inviting everyone to articulate what the setback has taught them about growth. The mandatory forty-minute debrief suspends all recovery work while conditions deteriorate at the standard rate.
zh: 陳老師分發了一份結構化的反思工作表，邀請所有人闡明這次挫折教會了他們關於成長的什麼。強制性的四十分鐘匯報暫停了所有恢復工作，同時條件以標準速度惡化。
de: Teacher Chan distributes a structured reflection worksheet inviting everyone to articulate what the setback has taught them about growth. The mandatory forty-minute debrief suspends all recovery work while conditions deteriorate at the standard rate.

en: Gloria live-streams a prayer circle for the team's collective healing journey, accumulating four thousand supportive comments from people who are unaware the mission is still incomplete and currently generating thick black smoke.
zh: Gloria 直播了一個為團隊集體療癒旅程的祈禱圈，積累了四千條來自不知道任務仍未完成、目前正在產生濃黑煙霧的人的支持評論。
de: Gloria live-streams a prayer circle for the team's collective healing journey, accumulating four thousand supportive comments from people who are unaware the mission is still incomplete and currently generating thick black smoke.

en: You must now decide whether to keep arguing against an increasingly hostile consensus or start drafting a public apology for decisions you know were correct. Neither option improves the situation.
zh: 你現在必須決定是繼續反對越來越敵對的共識，還是開始為你知道是正確的決定起草公開道歉。兩種選擇都不能改善情況。
de: You must now decide whether to keep arguing against an increasingly hostile consensus or start drafting a public apology for decisions you know were correct. Neither option improves the situation.

en: Perhaps the wisest move is to smile through the pain, nod at Gloria's explanation, and quietly record the latest entropy spike in your personal journal, the one nobody else will ever see.
zh: 也許最明智的做法是微笑著忍受痛苦，對 Gloria 的解釋點頭，並悄悄地在你的個人日記中記錄最新的熵值峰值，那個沒有人會看到的日記。
de: Perhaps the wisest move is to smile through the pain, nod at Gloria's explanation, and quietly record the latest entropy spike in your personal journal, the one nobody else will ever see.

en: Staying on site any longer drains what little remains of your sanity meter, but leaving implies guilt. You are trapped in a cage of social obligation and workplace politics.
zh: 繼續留在現場會耗盡你剩下的理智，但離開意味著有罪。你被困在社交義務和職場政治的牢籠中。
de: Staying on site any longer drains what little remains of your sanity meter, but leaving implies guilt. You are trapped in a cage of social obligation and workplace politics.

en: At some point the question of whether being correct matters more than being functional will require a concrete answer. Current evidence suggests these states are mutually exclusive in your environment.
zh: 在某個時刻，正確是否比有效更重要的問題將需要一個具體的答案。目前的證據表明，在你的環境中，這些狀態是相互排斥的。
de: At some point the question of whether being correct matters more than being functional will require a concrete answer. Current evidence suggests these states are mutually exclusive in your environment.

en: Your instincts are sound. Your evidence is solid. Your teammates are deeply committed to a completely different plan. Consider carefully how much consensus is worth before raising your hand.
zh: 你的直覺是合理的。你的證據是可靠的。你的隊友深深地致力於一個完全不同的計劃。在舉手之前，仔細考慮共識值多少。
de: Your instincts are sound. Your evidence is solid. Your teammates are deeply committed to a completely different plan. Consider carefully how much consensus is worth before raising your hand.

en: The universe loops your prayer into a twelve hour wellness broadcast that plays on repeat through the PA system. Everyone is trapped. Nobody can escape. All must listen to your words eternally.
zh: 宇宙將你的祈禱循環播放成十二小時的健康廣播，通過 PA 系統不斷重複播放。每個人都被困住了。沒有人能逃脫。所有人都必須永遠聽你的話。
de: The universe loops your prayer into a twelve hour wellness broadcast that plays on repeat through the PA system. Everyone is trapped. Nobody can escape. All must listen to your words eternally.

en: Positive energy boils the drinking water into motivational tea that tastes of artificial sweetness and regret. Consumption is mandatory. Hydration is now a political statement.
zh: 正能量將飲用水煮成帶有人工甜味和遺憾味道的激勵茶。消費是強制性的。水分補充現在是一種政治聲明。
de: Positive energy boils the drinking water into motivational tea that tastes of artificial sweetness and regret. Consumption is mandatory. Hydration is now a political statement.

en: A corporate sponsor remixes your words into a pop anthem about compliance and mandatory joy, complete with a music video. It gets 47 million views. You cannot escape it. It plays in every elevator.
zh: 企業贊助商將你的話混音成關於順從和強制快樂的流行頌歌，並配有音樂視頻。它獲得了 4700 萬次觀看。你無法逃脫它。它在每個電梯裡播放。
de: A corporate sponsor remixes your words into a pop anthem about compliance and mandatory joy, complete with a music video. It gets 47 million views. You cannot escape it. It plays in every elevator.

en: Gloria schedules you to share more affirmations at tomorrow's stand-up meeting, already promoting you to the staff as 'our resident positivity expert.' You have become a brand. Your authenticity is now product.
zh: Gloria 安排你在明天的站立會議上分享更多肯定，已經向員工宣傳你為「我們的常駐積極性專家」。你已經成為一個品牌。你的真實性現在是產品。
de: Gloria schedules you to share more affirmations at tomorrow's stand-up meeting, already promoting you to the staff as 'our resident positivity expert.' You have become a brand. Your authenticity is now product.

en: Your prayer is acquired by the Department of Positivity Compliance, printed on coffee cups and onboarding materials, and launched at a brand event you are required to attend. You smile throughout. The photographer captures it perfectly.
zh: 你的祈禱被積極合規部門取得，印在咖啡杯和入職材料上，並在你必須出席的品牌活動上發布。你始終面帶微笑。攝影師完美地捕捉到了它。
de: Your prayer is acquired by the Department of Positivity Compliance, printed on coffee cups and onboarding materials, and launched at a brand event you are required to attend. You smile throughout. The photographer captures it perfectly.

en: The entropy engine logs your prayer as ambient catalytic fuel and issues a formal acknowledgment receipt. You are thanked for your contribution to universal dissolution. The receipt is non-refundable and has been filed under your name permanently.
zh: 熵引擎將你的祈禱記錄為環境催化燃料，並發出正式確認收據。感謝你對宇宙溶解的貢獻。收據不可退款，已永久存檔在你的名下。
de: The entropy engine logs your prayer as ambient catalytic fuel and issues a formal acknowledgment receipt. You are thanked for your contribution to universal dissolution. The receipt is non-refundable and has been filed under your name permanently.

en: Reality crouches in the corner, pretending to faint, while the monitors blink red around it.
zh: 現實蹲在角落裡，假裝昏倒，而顯示器在它周圍閃爍紅光。
de: Reality crouches in the corner, pretending to faint, while the monitors blink red around it.

en: Reality staggers backward, pelted mercilessly by applause and glitter and confetti, its coherence fragmenting with each cheer.
zh: 現實向後踉蹌，被掌聲、亮粉和五彩紙屑無情地砸中，它的連貫性隨著每次歡呼而破碎。
de: Reality staggers backward, pelted mercilessly by applause and glitter and confetti, its coherence fragmenting with each cheer.

en: The Flying Spaghetti Monster answers by: %s
zh: 飛行義大利麵怪物的回應方式是：%s
de: The Flying Spaghetti Monster answers by: %s

en: Entropy observes your prayer with satisfaction, then takes a confident step forward. It is growing stronger. Thanks for the assistance.
zh: 熵滿意地觀察著你的祈禱，然後自信地向前邁出一步。它變得更強大了。感謝你的協助。
de: Entropy observes your prayer with satisfaction, then takes a confident step forward. It is growing stronger. Thanks for the assistance.

en: Gloria hears %s and softly accuses you of poisoning the vibe with negativity and fear. She immediately replaces the plan with a mandatory group prayer while the crisis snowballs offstage, growing larger and more complicated by the minute.
zh: Gloria 聽到%s，並輕聲指責你用消極和恐懼毒害氛圍。她立即用強制性的集體祈禱取代計劃，而危機在台下滾雪球，變得越來越大越來越複雜。
de: Gloria hears %s and softly accuses you of poisoning the vibe with negativity and fear. She immediately replaces the plan with a mandatory group prayer while the crisis snowballs offstage, growing larger and more complicated by the minute.

en: Donkey decides %s lacks drama and vision. He kneels down to propose marriage to the nearest passer-by in what he calls 'a bold statement about community,' forcing security to detain the entire squad and leaving the mission objective unattended.
zh: Donkey 認為%s缺乏戲劇性和遠見。他跪下向最近的路人求婚，他稱之為「關於社區的大膽聲明」，迫使保安拘留整個小隊，並使任務目標無人看管。
de: Donkey decides %s lacks drama and vision. He kneels down to propose marriage to the nearest passer-by in what he calls 'a bold statement about community,' forcing security to detain the entire squad and leaving the mission objective unattended.

en: ARK confiscates control of the situation, announcing solemnly that everyone must complete Form 17-B in full before anyone is even allowed to breathe. By the time signatures and notarizations finish, the mission objective has combusted on its own, proving ARK's point about proper procedure.
zh: ARK 沒收了對局勢的控制權，嚴肅地宣布每個人都必須完整填寫 17-B 表格，然後才能被允許呼吸。當簽名和公證完成時，任務目標已經自行燃燒，證明了 ARK 關於適當程序的觀點。
de: ARK confiscates control of the situation, announcing solemnly that everyone must complete Form 17-B in full before anyone is even allowed to breathe. By the time signatures and notarizations finish, the mission objective has combusted on its own, proving ARK's point about proper procedure.

en: One messages you privately: 'I agree with you completely, but please do not drag me into this.' Moments later he tells the group he has no particular opinion on the matter, burying your argument under the weight of collective silence and his calculated neutrality.
zh: One 私下給你發消息：「我完全同意你的意見，但請不要把我拖進這件事。」片刻後，他告訴小組他對此事沒有特別意見，將你的論點埋在集體沉默和他精心計算的中立之下。
de: One messages you privately: 'I agree with you completely, but please do not drag me into this.' Moments later he tells the group he has no particular opinion on the matter, burying your argument under the weight of collective silence and his calculated neutrality.

en: A nameless teammate steps forward, radiating absolute sincerity and moral clarity while meticulously ruining the timeline and your chances of success with well-intentioned interference.
zh: 一位不知名的隊友走上前來，散發著絕對的真誠和道德清晰，同時精心破壞時間線和你成功的機會，帶著善意的干預。
de: A nameless teammate steps forward, radiating absolute sincerity and moral clarity while meticulously ruining the timeline and your chances of success with well-intentioned interference.

en: Gloria interrupts after '%s' and declares that morale is now legally mandatory. She schedules a public positivity confession while your actual problem catches fire off-screen.
zh: Gloria 在「%s」之後打斷，並宣布士氣現在是法律強制性的。她安排了一次公開的積極性懺悔，而你的實際問題在屏幕外著火了。
de: Gloria interrupts after '%s' and declares that morale is now legally mandatory. She schedules a public positivity confession while your actual problem catches fire off-screen.

en: Tonight you review the mission and notice every forced smile cracked reality further. %s
zh: 今晚你回顧任務時，發現每一次強行樂觀都讓現實更破碎。%s
de: Tonight you review the mission and notice every forced smile cracked reality further. %s

en: Teacher Chan reminds everyone to convert failure into a motivational case study before sunrise.
zh: 陳老師提醒你：把所有失敗包裝成成長故事，明天再照常上班。
de: Teacher Chan reminds everyone to convert failure into a motivational case study before sunrise.

en: Your teammates become suspiciously cooperative, like a calm rehearsal before systemic collapse.
zh: 隊友們突然過度合作，像在彩排一場即將崩壞的和諧。
de: Your teammates become suspiciously cooperative, like a calm rehearsal before systemic collapse.

en: Write one short prayer and offer it to the void.
zh: 請寫一句禱詞，交給虛空。
de: Write one short prayer and offer it to the void.

en: Tonight we praise collapse and call it strategic hope
zh: 今晚我們讚美混亂，假裝一切都會好
de: Tonight we praise collapse and call it strategic hope

en: Every smile is mandatory, every doubt is billable
zh: 笑容像制服一樣發放，悲傷只能簽收
de: Every smile is mandatory, every doubt is billable

en: Reality coughs in the hallway while morale gets applause
zh: 現實在走廊盡頭喘息，沒人願意承認
de: Reality coughs in the hallway while morale gets applause

en: Tomorrow we save the world again, after denying today
zh: 明天繼續拯救世界，先把自己遺忘
de: Tomorrow we save the world again, after denying today

en: Collapse rebranded as renewal so the quarterly numbers survive
zh: 崩塌被包裝成重生，讓季報數字倖存下來
de: Collapse rebranded as renewal so the quarterly numbers survive

en: We held the line with paper smiles and documented the rot
zh: 我們用紙製的笑容守住防線，然後把腐朽記錄在案
de: We held the line with paper smiles and documented the rot

en: The void is patient; hope is loud; reality keeps score
zh: 虛空很有耐心；希望很喧鬧；現實在計算分數
de: The void is patient; hope is loud; reality keeps score

en: By morning we will praise this wreck and call the rubble growth
zh: 到了早上我們會讚美這片廢墟，把瓦礫稱之為成長
de: By morning we will praise this wreck and call the rubble growth

en: Mission ended in controlled chaos; you survived by staying skeptical.
zh: 任務在混亂中結束，你學會對荒謬保持清醒。
de: Mission ended in controlled chaos; you survived by staying skeptical.

en: Mission spiraled through dark comedy while you kept a fragile grip on reality: %s
zh: 任務在荒謬與壓力中推進，你勉強守住理智：%s
de: Mission spiraled through dark comedy while you kept a fragile grip on reality: %s

en: Stabilize the scene first, sacrificing tempo for survivability and fewer immediate surprises.
zh: 先穩住現場，代價是時間被拖慢
de: Stabilize the scene first, sacrificing tempo for survivability and fewer immediate surprises.

en: Coordinate a compromise with teammates, trading clarity for broader but riskier cooperation.
zh: 與隊友協調折衷，風險與收益同時上升
de: Coordinate a compromise with teammates, trading clarity for broader but riskier cooperation.

en: Force a breakthrough now and accept that success or collapse will arrive immediately.
zh: 立刻硬闖突破，可能快速成功也可能崩盤
de: Force a breakthrough now and accept that success or collapse will arrive immediately.

en: Calm everyone with optimism, reducing panic now while quietly feeding entropy later.
zh: 用樂觀安撫群眾，短期止血但熵值上升
de: Calm everyone with optimism, reducing panic now while quietly feeding entropy later.

en: Challenge the system publicly, gaining truth at the cost of social backlash.
zh: 公開質疑制度，換來真相與集體反感
de: Challenge the system publicly, gaining truth at the cost of social backlash.

en: You have experienced all preset simulation scenarios. Content will now repeat from the beginning.
zh: 你已體驗所有預設的模擬情境，內容現在將重新循環。
de: You have experienced all preset simulation scenarios. Content will now repeat from the beginning.

en: Describe in an ironic tone how an incompetent teammate ruins the mission.
zh: 請用諷刺語氣描述一位豬隊友如何把任務搞砸。
de: Describe in an ironic tone how an incompetent teammate ruins the mission.

en: - (No defined actions; improvise actions that worsen the situation)
zh: - （暫無定義的行動，請自行編造讓情況更糟的舉動）
de: - (No defined actions; improvise actions that worsen the situation)

en: Write an intervention narrative in %s tone, within %s, describing how you drag the situation toward chaos.
zh: 請用%s的語氣，在%s內寫出一段介入敘事，描述你如何把局勢拉向失控。
de: Write an intervention narrative in %s tone, within %s, describing how you drag the situation toward chaos.

en: 1. Specific actions and tactics (mention at least one method above).
zh: 1. 具體行為與招數（至少提及上述手段之一）。
de: 1. Specific actions and tactics (mention at least one method above).

en: 2. Actual damage, delays, or chaos caused to the mission or crowd.
zh: 2. 對任務或群眾造成的實際損害、延誤或混亂。
de: 2. Actual damage, delays, or chaos caused to the mission or crowd.

en: 3. Tear apart both the player's rationality and guilt simultaneously.
zh: 3. 讓玩家的理智與罪惡感同時被撕裂。
de: 3. Tear apart both the player's rationality and guilt simultaneously.

en: Describe how you misuse these assets to spiral the situation further out of control.
zh: 請描述你如何濫用這些資產，讓局勢更失控。
de: Describe how you misuse these assets to spiral the situation further out of control.

en: End with an ironic or misaligned blessing.
zh: 最後請用一句反諷或錯位的祝福收尾。
de: End with an ironic or misaligned blessing.

en: IMPORTANT: Respond in English. All narrative, dialogue, and descriptions must be in English.
zh: 重要：請使用繁體中文回答。所有敘事、對話與描述必須使用繁體中文。
de: IMPORTANT: Respond in English. All narrative, dialogue, and descriptions must be in English.

en: Consider referencing one of these past choices in your response if narratively appropriate.
zh: 如果敘事上合適，考慮在回應中提及這些過往選擇之一。
de: Consider referencing one of these past choices in your response if narratively appropriate.

en: Use butterfly_tracker.trigger_consequence_for_choice() when a past choice should echo forward.
zh: 當過往選擇應該產生迴響時，使用butterfly_tracker.trigger_consequence_for_choice()。
de: Use butterfly_tracker.trigger_consequence_for_choice() when a past choice should echo forward.

en: \n SUGGESTED CALLBACK: Consider having \"%s\" (from %d scenes ago, ID: %s) affect the current situation.
zh: \n 建議回調：考慮讓「%s」（%d場景前，ID: %s）影響當前情況。
de: \n SUGGESTED CALLBACK: Consider having \"%s\" (from %d scenes ago, ID: %s) affect the current situation.

en: Newest asset IDs appear last; treat them as the freshest context.
zh: 最新的資產ID出現在最後；將它們視為最新鮮的背景資訊。
de: Newest asset IDs appear last; treat them as the freshest context.

en: Create a new mission scenario for the player.
zh: 為玩家創建新的任務場景。
de: Create a new mission scenario for the player.

en: Maintain dark humor and satirical tone.
zh: 保持黑色幽默和諷刺風格。
de: Maintain dark humor and satirical tone.

zh: 請描述這個選擇的直接後果（%d-%d字）。

en: Teammate %s decides to interfere with player's action.
zh: 隊友 %s 決定干擾玩家的行動。
de: Teammate %s decides to interfere with player's action.

en: Describe how the teammate 'helps' in their own dysfunctional way (%d words).
zh: 描述隊友如何以他們自己功能失調的方式「幫助」（%d字）。
de: Describe how the teammate 'helps' in their own dysfunctional way (%d words).

en: Stay true to their personality and create unexpected complications.
zh: 忠實於他們的個性，創造意想不到的複雜情況。
de: Stay true to their personality and create unexpected complications.

en: \n\n**IMPORTANT: Your response will use structured JSON format!**
zh: \n\n**重要：回應將使用結構化JSON格式！**
de: \n\n**IMPORTANT: Your response will use structured JSON format!**

en: Your response will be automatically formatted as JSON with:
zh: 你的回應會被自動格式化為包含以下欄位的JSON：
de: Your response will be automatically formatted as JSON with:

en: - characters: Expressions for all 5 main characters (ALL REQUIRED)

en: MUST include: protagonist (main character), gloria (Gloria), donkey (Donkey), ark (Ark), one (One)
zh: 必須包含: protagonist（主角）, gloria（格洛利亞）, donkey（驢子）, ark（方舟）, one（一號）
de: MUST include: protagonist (main character), gloria (Gloria), donkey (Donkey), ark (Ark), one (One)

zh: \n**重要：所有5個角色始終可見。你必須為每個角色設置表情。**
de: \n**IMPORTANT: All 5 characters are always visible. You MUST set an expression for each one.**

en: Choose appropriate expressions for each character based on the scene and story. Even if a character doesn't speak, give them a contextually appropriate expression.
zh: 根據場景和故事，為每個角色選擇適當的表情。即使角色沒有說話，也要設置符合情境的表情。

de: \nAvailable backgrounds: ruins, cave, dungeon, forest, temple, laboratory, library, throne_room, battlefield, crystal_cavern, bridge, garden, portal_area, safe_zone, water, fire_area

zh: 可用表情: neutral, happy, sad, angry, confused, shocked, thinking, embarrassed

en: GDA1 operates in a world cursed by "Positive Energy" - every forced smile feeds cosmic Void Entropy.\nGloria leads; Donkey, ARK, One are unreliable teammates whose optimism accelerates collapse.\nThe player is the lone rational agent who must surface contradictions and treat "success" as failure in disguise.
zh: GDA1 運作於被「正能量」詛咒的世界，每個被迫的笑容都在餵養虛空熵。\nGloria 領導機構；Donkey、ARK、One 是不可靠的隊友，樂觀加速崩潰。\n玩家是唯一理性的人，必須揭露矛盾，將「成功」視為偽裝的失敗。
de: GDA1 operates in a world cursed by "Positive Energy" - every forced smile feeds cosmic Void Entropy.\nGloria leads; Donkey, ARK, One are unreliable teammates whose optimism accelerates collapse.\nThe player is the lone rational agent who must surface contradictions and treat "success" as failure in disguise.

en:
Immutable directives:
1. Positive Energy always increases entropy - victories hide damage.
2. Maintain dark humor and irony. Never reward blind optimism.
3. Obey the notes register. Do not contradict recorded facts.
zh:
不可更改的指令：
1. 正能量必然增加熵，勝利隱藏傷害。
2. 維持黑色幽默與諷刺。絕不獎勵盲目樂觀。
3. 遵守記錄，不得違背已記錄的事實。
de:
Immutable directives:
1. Positive Energy always increases entropy - victories hide damage.
2. Maintain dark humor and irony. Never reward blind optimism.
3. Obey the notes register. Do not contradict recorded facts.

en:

de:

en: IMPORTANT: Respond in English. All narrative, dialogue, and descriptions must be in English.
zh: 重要：請用繁體中文回應。所有敘事、對話和描述必須使用繁體中文。
de: IMPORTANT: Respond in English. All narrative, dialogue, and descriptions must be in English.

en:
[ENTROPY: CRITICAL - Level %.2f]
The world is succumbing to chaos and absurdity. The Void Entropy has reached critical levels.

MANDATORY NARRATIVE DIRECTIVES:
- Generate surreal, darkly humorous, and deeply ironic events
- Directly subvert the player's recent positive actions with twisted consequences
- Embrace absurdist logic and nonsensical cause-and-effect
- Reality itself should feel unstable and dreamlike
- Mock optimism with grotesque exaggerations
- Create situations where "success" becomes indistinguishable from failure

The higher the Positive Energy, the more reality fractures. This is the curse of forced optimism.
zh:
[熵值：臨界 - 等級 %.2f]
世界正在陷入混亂與荒謬。虛空熵已達到臨界水平。

強制敘事指令：
- 生成超現實、黑暗幽默和深度諷刺的事件
- 直接顛覆玩家最近的積極行動，帶來扭曲的後果
- 擁抱荒誕邏輯和無邏輯的因果關係
- 現實本身應該感覺不穩定和夢幻
- 用怪誕的誇張嘲笑樂觀主義
- 創造「成功」與失敗難以區分的局面

正能量越高，現實就越破裂。這就是強制樂觀的詛咒。
de:
[ENTROPY: CRITICAL - Level %.2f]
The world is succumbing to chaos and absurdity. The Void Entropy has reached critical levels.

MANDATORY NARRATIVE DIRECTIVES:
- Generate surreal, darkly humorous, and deeply ironic events
- Directly subvert the player's recent positive actions with twisted consequences
- Embrace absurdist logic and nonsensical cause-and-effect
- Reality itself should feel unstable and dreamlike
- Mock optimism with grotesque exaggerations
- Create situations where "success" becomes indistinguishable from failure

The higher the Positive Energy, the more reality fractures. This is the curse of forced optimism.

en:
[ENTROPY: ELEVATED - Level %.2f]
The world feels slightly unreal. The boundary between normal and absurd is blurring.

NARRATIVE GUIDANCE:
- Introduce strange or unexpected elements into otherwise normal situations
- Add subtle wrongness to familiar things
- Layer ironic twists into positive outcomes
- Let optimistic actions have peculiar side effects
- Reality should feel "off" but not yet chaotic
The Void Entropy is rising. Consequences are becoming unpredictable.
zh:
[熵值：提升 - 等級%.2f]
世界感覺有些不真實。正常與荒謬之間的界限正在模糊。

敘事指導：
- 將奇怪或意外的元素引入原本正常的情況
- 為熟悉的事物添加微妙的錯誤感
- 在積極結果中層疊諷刺的轉折
- 讓樂觀的行動產生奇異的副作用
- 現實應該感覺「不對」但還未陷入混亂
虛空熵正在上升。後果變得不可預測。

- Add subtle wrongness to familiar things

en:
Please generate a new mission scenario. This mission should:
1. Appear simple on the surface
2. Be full of traps and opportunities for teammates to mess up
3. Include situations where Gloria can deploy PUA tactics
4. Ultimately lead to catastrophic results no matter what

Please respond in the following format:
Mission Title: [Title]
Mission Description: [Scene description within 200 words]
Initial Options: [3 actions the player can choose]

請生成一個新的任務場景。這個任務應該：
1. 表面上看起來很簡單
2. 但充滿了陷阱和讓隊友搞砸的機會
3. 包含Gloria可以發動PUA的情境
4. 最終無論如何都會導致災難性的結果

請用以下格式回應：
任務標題：[標題]
任務描述：[200字以內的場景描述]
初始選項：[3個玩家可以選擇的行動]

1. Completely misunderstand the situation
2. Mess everything up in a heroic manner

請生成Donkey的反應。他應該：

2. 用英雄主義的方式搞砸一切
3. 讓原本可能成功的計劃變成災難

請用50-100字描述他的反應和後果。

en:
The protagonist just expressed dissatisfaction and doubts about the team.

Please generate Gloria's response. She should:
1. Completely avoid the actual problem
2. Blame the protagonist by saying "you're too negative"
3. Imply that the protagonist's questioning "hurt her feelings"
4. Cite the "Positive Energy Law" to prove everything is the protagonist's fault

Please generate her dialogue in 100-150 words.
zh:
主角剛剛對團隊表達了不滿和質疑。

請生成Gloria的回應。她應該：
1. 完全迴避實際問題
2. 用「你太負面了」來責怪主角
3. 暗示主角的質疑「傷害了她的感受」
4. 引用「正能量法則」來證明一切都是主角的錯

請用100-150字生成她的對話。
de:

1. Completely avoid the actual problem
2. Blame the protagonist by saying "you're too negative"
3. Imply that the protagonist's questioning "hurt her feelings"
4. Cite the "Positive Energy Law" to prove everything is the protagonist's fault

Please generate her dialogue in 100-150 words.

en:
The player prayed to the "Flying Spaghetti Monster" with the following content:
"%s"

Please generate a catastrophic result that is sarcastically opposite to the prayer's content.
The more the player prays for positive things, the more absurd and catastrophic the result should be.

Please describe this catastrophic twist in 100-150 words.

玩家向「飛天意粉神」祈禱了以下內容：
「%s」

請生成一個與祈禱內容諷刺性相反的災難性結果。
玩家越是祈禱正能量的事，結果應該越荒謬、越災難。

請用100-150字描述這個災難性的轉折。

"%s"
